title: malvastrum scabrum
intro: Malvastrum scabrum, also known as the rough mallow, is a plant species belonging to the Mallow family (Malvaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Malvastrum scabrum include soothing coughs, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of digestive problems, such as diarrhea and constipation. Malvastrum scabrum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can be used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
